info.title: UK Companies House Public Data API
info.description: The Companies House API provides read-only access to search and retrieve public company data for companies registered in the United Kingdom. It includes company profiles, officer details, filing history, charges, insolvency data, persons with significant control, and more.

tags.name: search
tags.description: Search across companies, officers, and disqualified officers

get.description: Search across all indexed resources including companies, officers, and disqualified officers.

parameters.description: Index of the first result to return.

apiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
apiKeyAuth.description: API key passed as Basic authentication in the Authorization header. Use your API key as the username with an empty password.
